summary: Full E2E validation of the rewritten Storefront unified-login + responsive + dark/light theme overhaul. Backend regression (panel/login, store/auth/login, store/plans, store/health) passes. Frontend tested at mobile 375x667, tablet 768x1024, desktop 1440x800 — all 14 acceptance criteria in the review request PASS.
critical_code_review_comments: Storefront.js line 206 calls /api/panel/login via direct fetch instead of going through panel AuthContext — acceptable per agent-to-agent note, but means the panel-side AuthContext is left out-of-sync until /panel page loads. Currently fine because /panel reads sessionStorage on mount, but worth flagging for future refactor.
store.css has minor cosmetic note: on desktop sticky right column uses top:88px; if the header height grows in future this would need re-tuning. Non-blocking.
useTheme.js defaults to dark when no system preference & no localStorage key — minor inconsistency vs typical 'follow system' behaviour but matches existing panel convention; not a bug.
test_credentials: Web: storetest@example.com / password1234 — Panel: pnldoctest / 123456 (both re-seeded this session)
seed_data_creation: Re-ran /app/scripts/seed_storetest.js and /app/scripts/seed_paneltest_account.js to ensure both accounts exist for tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Storefront /store landing page now has a single unified auth card. Mobile/tablet: login appears first (above hero+plans) with input y~210px — well above 0.7×viewport. Desktop ≥1024px: 2-col grid with plans LEFT (x=108) and login RIGHT (x=952, sticky). Theme toggle (Moon/Sun icon) at top right works and persists via localStorage key 'panel-theme-pref'. Form auto-routes by '@' presence in the identifier: email → /api/store/auth/login, username → /api/panel/login. Element data-testid='store-existing-login' is confirmed NOT present. All 14 review criteria pass.
rca of the issue: N/A — no defects found. The UI overhaul meets the user's request: login is visible without scrolling on all three breakpoints, the dual-form / top-right link is gone, dark/light toggle is functional and persistent, and both web-user and panel-user auth flows work end-to-end.
